item.title: John Mulaney is out of F’s and I’m here for it
item.dc:creator: ninjzaness

item.title: Extra Life - LFG!
item.description: I’m so honored to once again join team @Imgur and help with Extra Life - A charity event to help Children's Hospitals! My goal this year is to raise $2,250 toward their overall goal and I would love if you donated using my link below to help kids this year! I raise money for “Seattle Children’s”! I already pitched in!: https://www.extra-life.org/participant/521502 Also, special shoutout to @Imgur - who is not only my husband (long story - look up my Upvote Everything Day Posts) but who is always so supportive of me and who I am, and who has never turned me away! Also yes, I would be the one who knows how to pronounce it :P
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Pumpkin spice girl and goth girl
item.description: I need name suggestions. People will say they were very good friends ☺️????☕️ But they’re ??? ??? Time taken : 13 hours over 3 days Program used: Procreate Extra nsfw drawings: patreon.com/miaormoa You can commission here: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella/commissions

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
as is tradition
haters, if you're reading this, the meme is very accurate
one of the best holes out there
the red one is Circuit City
gary oldman everyone gif
always
that's rough (ruff)
make me
i don't like this
i have no qualms with ohio
alright i guess
Rogen
Only who can prevent forest fires? You have selected “you”, referring to me. That is incorrect. The correct answer is you.
she's sensitive ok
mmm hmm
i knew this wasn't right
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: You guys like my Boo's?
item.description: Very bouncy File design by Pla-n-Pa. There's a shy version and a regular version. Can be strung up as you can see
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Fucking emotions
item.description: So yeah. Probation officer, I work with people on probation/parole. I'm a big dude, fit, capable, reliable. I'll spring I to action in the real world when people need help. And I'm broken. Cptsd diagnosis...working in corrections was fun (/s) yes I have a therapist, he's fucking awesome. I have friends but what I want above all else in the worst way is to just be held. I want to feel arms around me, I want someone to comfort me for a change. I'm just fucking exhausted. Check in on your friends. Especially the loud ones. Folks try the hardest when they're really hurting.
item.dc:creator: Syndicofberyl

item.title: we've gone from s*xting to gexting
item.description: if you get that gex reference, take some ibuprofen for your lower back

item.title: Worst crossover ever.
item.description: Edit: Wow! Did not expect this to go viral. Remember to check your registration, make sure you have your documents and VOTE. Otherwise we can expect a bunch of shitty spin offs and sequels.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1144 (plutonium jazz)
item.description:
It's morning. Pippin and I are ready to make the universe apologize for our continued existence. Let's get this bread.
Reference to the Old Testament book of Jonah.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "uh oh."

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Thursday Random Meme Dump (no politics, just laughs)
item.description:
1. WELCOME TO DEMOCRACY!
2. Athletes are so greaceful
3. Ooops
4. Dope prank
5. Guy friends: I see no problem here!
6. They called him Tony HAWK
7
8. How's the workout going? Me:
9
10. And Oscar Goes To...
11
12
13
14. "Trust me, Arthur! I have a plan." The Plan:
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's humor and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. I'm working on tons of fun stuff to do in it! For example: JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Racism at its finest…wtf is wrong with people
item.dc:creator: MahadmaGaudi

item.title: "Predator Trophy" 3D printed skull and spine.
item.description: I finished this project a couple of months ago and just realized I never shared it on here. This was all 3D printed from files I found on Thingiverse. I had to modify the spine a lot to attach it to the skull and make it flexible, but sturdy. I also put acrylic teeth into the skull to make it more realistic. All of the gore is cloth and permablood. Skull model made by Buzzsawstudio and spine was model from DaveMakesStuff
item.dc:creator: Oaklanecemetery
